refundCancellation.valueCandidate: Elai paid service fees are non-refundable.
refundCancellation.snippet: The current terms state that fees for paid services, including renewal fees, are non-refundable.

refundCancellation.valueCandidate: Elai service access can be terminated by contacting support.
refundCancellation.snippet: The current terms say users may terminate access to paid services at any time by contacting Elai Support.

workflowFeatureDocs.valueCandidate: Elai generates AI videos with digital human avatars from text and supports 75+ languages.
workflowFeatureDocs.snippet: Official product and API pages describe text-to-video creation with digital presenters, broad avatar selection, and multilingual output in more than 75 languages.

workflowFeatureDocs.valueCandidate: Elai feature set includes text to video, PPTX-to-video, auto translation, screen recording, voice cloning, and realtime AI chat.
workflowFeatureDocs.snippet: The enterprise and features pages enumerate creation and workflow tools including text-to-video, PPTX-to-video, auto translation, screen recording, voice cloning, and realtime chat.

security.valueCandidate: Elai positions privacy and data protection as a core part of the platform.
security.snippet: The security policy states that Elai prioritizes protection of client data and user experience across the platform.

security.valueCandidate: Elai security policy explicitly covers uploaded scripts, text, photos, videos, and music.
security.snippet: Elai's security documentation names scripts, texts, photos, videos, and music uploaded by users as protected data categories.

api.valueCandidate: Elai offers API access for customization, automation, and app integrations.
api.snippet: Elai describes a dedicated API that supports integrations across applications and programmatic video creation workflows.

api.valueCandidate: Elai API access uses a personal API token and has dedicated API docs.
api.snippet: The getting started page instructs users to create or find an API token and points to API documentation for implementation details.

enterprise.valueCandidate: Elai enterprise supports SSO, team collaboration, brand kit, custom integrations, screen recording, and custom avatar plus voice cloning.
enterprise.snippet: The enterprise page lists SSO, team collaboration, brand kit support, custom integration, screen recording, and custom avatar / voice cloning as enterprise-ready capabilities.

enterprise.valueCandidate: Elai enterprise includes a dedicated account manager.
enterprise.snippet: The enterprise page says account managers guide customers throughout implementation and ongoing usage.
